SW - group cPCA - individual explained variance

Jiří Anýž

2025-05-05

All datasets

gcpca_ind <- 7
desc_help <- desc[match(Sets[[gcpca_ind]],desc$dataset),]
kable(desc_help)
dataset group visit

ESO_P03377_20240506_1013_2 p 2

cPC 1

boxplot(ExplVari[[gcpca_ind]][,1] ~ desc_help$group + desc_help$visit,
        frame=F,xaxt='n',xlab='',ylab='Explained variance [%]',main='cPC 1')
axis(side=1,at=1:4,labels=c('Group HC x V1','Group P x V1','Group HC x V2','Group P x V2'))

cPC 2

boxplot(ExplVari[[gcpca_ind]][,2] ~ desc_help$group + desc_help$visit,
        frame=F,xaxt='n',xlab='',ylab='Explained variance [%]',main='cPC 2')
axis(side=1,at=1:4,labels=c('Group HC x V1','Group P x V1','Group HC x V2','Group P x V2'))

### cPC 3

boxplot(ExplVari[[gcpca_ind]][,3] ~ desc_help$group + desc_help$visit,
        frame=F,xaxt='n',xlab='',ylab='Explained variance [%]',main='cPC 3')
axis(side=1,at=1:4,labels=c('Group HC x V1','Group P x V1','Group HC x V2','Group P x V2'))

tab <- table(apply(ExplVari[[gcpca_ind]][,2:5] > ExplVari[[gcpca_ind]][,1],1,any),GROUP=desc_help$group,VISIT=desc_help$visit)
apply(tab,c(2,3),function(x) x[2]/(x[1]+x[2]))
##      VISIT
## GROUP   1    2
##     c 0.4 0.30
##     p 0.5 0.75

        frame=F,xaxt='n',xlab='',ylab='Explained variance [%]',main='cPC 1')
axis(side=1,at=1:2,labels=c('Group HC x V1','Group HC x V1'))

cPC 2

axis(side=1,at=1:2,labels=c('Group P x V1','Group P x V2'))

### cPC 3

boxplot(ExplVari[[gcpca_ind]][,3] ~  desc_help$visit,
        frame=F,xaxt='n',xlab='',ylab='Explained variance [%]',main='cPC 3')
axis(side=1,at=1:2,labels=c('Group P x V1','Group P x V2'))

tab <- table(apply(ExplVari[[gcpca_ind]][,2:5] > ExplVari[[gcpca_ind]][,1],1,any),GROUP=desc_help$group,VISIT=desc_help$visit)
apply(tab,c(2,3),function(x) x[2]/(x[1]+x[2]))
##      VISIT
## GROUP      1    2
##     p 0.5625 0.75
